<!doctype html>
<html lang="en">
  <head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8" />
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" />
    <meta http-equiv="X-UA-Compatible" content="ie=edge" />
    <title>Blankos Mobile</title>

    <link rel="icon" type="image/png" href="data:image/png;base64," sizes="16x16" />

    <link rel="icon" type="image/png" href="data:image/png;base64," sizes="32x32" />

    <link rel="icon" type="image/png" href="data:image/png;base64," sizes="96x96" />



    <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com" />
    <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin />
    <link
      href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Archivo+Black&family=Lato:wght@400;700;900&display=swap"
      rel="stylesheet"
    />
    <style>

      *,
      ::before,
      ::after {
        box-sizing: border-box; 
        border-width: 0; 
        border-style: solid; 
        border-color: currentColor; 
      }

      ::before,
      ::after {
        --tw-content: '';
      }

      html {
        line-height: 1.5; 
        -webkit-text-size-adjust: 100%; 
        -moz-tab-size: 4; 
        -o-tab-size: 4;
        tab-size: 4; 
        font-family:
          ui-sans-serif,
          system-ui,
          -apple-system,
          BlinkMacSystemFont,
          'Segoe UI',
          Roboto,
          'Helvetica Neue',
          Arial,
          'Noto Sans',
          sans-serif,
          'Apple Color Emoji',
          'Segoe UI Emoji',
          'Segoe UI Symbol',
          'Noto Color Emoji'; 
        font-feature-settings: normal; 
        font-variation-settings: normal; 
      }

      body {
        margin: 0; 
        line-height: inherit; 
      }

      hr {
        height: 0; 
        color: inherit; 
        border-top-width: 1px; 
      }


      abbr:where([title]) {
        -webkit-text-decoration: underline dotted;
        text-decoration: underline dotted;
      }


      h1,
      h2,
      h3,
      h4,
      h5,
      h6 {
        font-size: inherit;
        font-weight: inherit;
      }

      /*
Reset links to optimize for opt-in styling instead of opt-out.
*/

      a {
        color: inherit;
        text-decoration: inherit;
      }

      /*
Add the correct font weight in Edge and Safari.
*/

      b,
      strong {
        font-weight: bolder;
      }

      code,
      kbd,
      samp,
      pre {
        font-family: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Monaco, Consolas, 'Liberation Mono', 'Courier New', monospace; 
        font-size: 1em; 
      }


      small {
        font-size: 80%;
      }

      sub,
      sup {
        font-size: 75%;
        line-height: 0;
        position: relative;
        vertical-align: baseline;
      }

      sub {
        bottom: -0.25em;
      }

      sup {
        top: -0.5em;
      }


      table {
        text-indent: 0; 
        border-color: inherit; 
        border-collapse: collapse; 
      }

      button,
      input,
      optgroup,
      select,
      textarea {
        font-family: inherit; 
        font-size: 100%; 
        font-weight: inherit; 
        line-height: inherit; 
        color: inherit; 
        margin: 0; 
        padding: 0; 
      }

      /*
Remove the inheritance of text transform in Edge and Firefox.
*/

      button,
      select {
        text-transform: none;
      }

      /*
1. Correct the inability to style clickable types in iOS and Safari.
2. Remove default button styles.
*/

      button,
      [type='button'],
      [type='reset'],
      [type='submit'] {
        -webkit-appearance: button; 
        background-color: transparent; 
        background-image: none; 
      }

      /*
Use the modern Firefox focus style for all focusable elements.
*/

      :-moz-focusring {
        outline: auto;
      }

      :-moz-ui-invalid {
        box-shadow: none;
      }

      /*
Add the correct vertical alignment in Chrome and Firefox.
*/

      progress {
        vertical-align: baseline;
      }

      /*
Correct the cursor style of increment and decrement buttons in Safari.
*/

      ::-webkit-inner-spin-button,
      ::-webkit-outer-spin-button {
        height: auto;
      }

      /*
1. Correct the odd appearance in Chrome and Safari.
2. Correct the outline style in Safari.
*/

      [type='search'] {
        -webkit-appearance: textfield; 
        outline-offset: -2px; 
      }

      /*
Remove the inner padding in Chrome and Safari on macOS.
*/

      ::-webkit-search-decoration {
        -webkit-appearance: none;
      }

      ::-webkit-file-upload-button {
        -webkit-appearance: button; 
        font: inherit; 
      }

      /*
Add the correct display in Chrome and Safari.
*/

      summary {
        display: list-item;
      }

      /*
Removes the default spacing and border for appropriate elements.
*/

      blockquote,
      dl,
      dd,
      h1,
      h2,
      h3,
      h4,
      h5,
      h6,
      hr,
      figure,
      p,
      pre {
        margin: 0;
      }

      fieldset {
        margin: 0;
        padding: 0;
      }

      legend {
        padding: 0;
      }

      ol,
      ul,
      menu {
        list-style: none;
        margin: 0;
        padding: 0;
      }

      /*
Prevent resizing textareas horizontally by default.
*/

      textarea {
        resize: vertical;
      }

      /*
1. Reset the default placeholder opacity in Firefox. (https://github.com/tailwindlabs/tailwindcss/issues/3300)
2. Set the default placeholder color to the user's configured gray 400 color.
*/

      input::-moz-placeholder,
      textarea::-moz-placeholder {
        opacity: 1; 
        color: #9ca3af; 
      }

      input::placeholder,
      textarea::placeholder {
        opacity: 1; 
        color: #9ca3af; 
      }

      /*
Set the default cursor for buttons.
*/

      button,
      [role='button'] {
        cursor: pointer;
      }

      /*
Make sure disabled buttons don't get the pointer cursor.
*/
      :disabled {
        cursor: default;
      }

      img,
      svg,
      video,
      canvas,
      audio,
      iframe,
      embed,
      object {
        display: block; 
        vertical-align: middle; 
      }

      /*
Constrain images and videos to the parent width and preserve their intrinsic aspect ratio. (https://github.com/mozdevs/cssremedy/issues/14)
*/

      img,
      video {
        max-width: 100%;
        height: auto;
      }

      
      [hidden] {
        display: none;
      }

      *,
      ::before,
      ::after {
        --tw-border-spacing-x: 0;
        --tw-border-spacing-y: 0;
        --tw-translate-x: 0;
        --tw-translate-y: 0;
        --tw-rotate: 0;
        --tw-skew-x: 0;
        --tw-skew-y: 0;
        --tw-scale-x: 1;
        --tw-scale-y: 1;
        --tw-pan-x: ;
        --tw-pan-y: ;
        --tw-pinch-zoom: ;
        --tw-scroll-snap-strictness: proximity;
        --tw-ordinal: ;
        --tw-slashed-zero: ;
        --tw-numeric-figure: ;
        --tw-numeric-spacing: ;
        --tw-numeric-fraction: ;
        --tw-ring-inset: ;
        --tw-ring-offset-width: 0px;
        --tw-ring-offset-color: #fff;
        --tw-ring-color: rgb(59 130 246 / 0.5);
        --tw-ring-offset-shadow: 0 0 #0000;
        --tw-ring-shadow: 0 0 #0000;
        --tw-shadow: 0 0 #0000;
        --tw-shadow-colored: 0 0 #0000;
        --tw-blur: ;
        --tw-brightness: ;
        --tw-contrast: ;
        --tw-grayscale: ;
        --tw-hue-rotate: ;
        --tw-invert: ;
        --tw-saturate: ;
        --tw-sepia: ;
        --tw-drop-shadow: ;
        --tw-backdrop-blur: ;
        --tw-backdrop-brightness: ;
        --tw-backdrop-contrast: ;
        --tw-backdrop-grayscale: ;
        --tw-backdrop-hue-rotate: ;
        --tw-backdrop-invert: ;
        --tw-backdrop-opacity: ;
        --tw-backdrop-saturate: ;
        --tw-backdrop-sepia: ;
      }

      ::backdrop {
        --tw-border-spacing-x: 0;
        --tw-border-spacing-y: 0;
        --tw-translate-x: 0;
        --tw-translate-y: 0;
        --tw-rotate: 0;
        --tw-skew-x: 0;
        --tw-skew-y: 0;
        --tw-scale-x: 1;
        --tw-scale-y: 1;
        --tw-pan-x: ;
        --tw-pan-y: ;
        --tw-pinch-zoom: ;
        --tw-scroll-snap-strictness: proximity;
        --tw-ordinal: ;
        --tw-slashed-zero: ;
        --tw-numeric-figure: ;
        --tw-numeric-spacing: ;
        --tw-numeric-fraction: ;
        --tw-ring-inset: ;
        --tw-ring-offset-width: 0px;
        --tw-ring-offset-color: #fff;
        --tw-ring-color: rgb(59 130 246 / 0.5);
        --tw-ring-offset-shadow: 0 0 #0000;
        --tw-ring-shadow: 0 0 #0000;
        --tw-shadow: 0 0 #0000;
        --tw-shadow-colored: 0 0 #0000;
        --tw-blur: ;
        --tw-brightness: ;
        --tw-contrast: ;
        --tw-grayscale: ;
        --tw-hue-rotate: ;
        --tw-invert: ;
        --tw-saturate: ;
        --tw-sepia: ;
        --tw-drop-shadow: ;
        --tw-backdrop-blur: ;
        --tw-backdrop-brightness: ;
        --tw-backdrop-contrast: ;
        --tw-backdrop-grayscale: ;
        --tw-backdrop-hue-rotate: ;
        --tw-backdrop-invert: ;
        --tw-backdrop-opacity: ;
        --tw-backdrop-saturate: ;
        --tw-backdrop-sepia: ;
      }

      body {
        display: flex;
        min-height: 100vh;
        flex-direction: column;
        font-family: 'Lato', sans-serif;
      }

      @media (min-width: 1024px) {
        body {
          flex-direction: row;
        }
      }

      .left-col {
        position: relative;
        display: flex;
        width: 100%;
        flex-direction: column;
        align-items: center;
        justify-content: center;
        gap: 0px;
        background-image: radial-gradient(47% 73% at 50% 50%, #ff2c82 0%, #af0c5c 100%);
        padding-left: 1.25rem;
        padding-right: 1.25rem;
        padding-top: 1.25rem;
        padding-bottom: 3rem;
      }

      .left-col::before {
        position: absolute;
        left: 0px;
        top: 0px;
        display: block;
        height: 100%;
        width: 100%;
        background-image: url('data:image/svg+xml;base64,'),
          url('data:image/svg+xml;base64,');
        background-size:
          110% auto,
          cover;
        background-position:
          bottom -1px center,
          center center;
        background-repeat: no-repeat;
        --tw-content: '';
        content: var(--tw-content);
      }

      @media (min-width: 1024px) {
        .left-col {
          width: 60%;
          gap: 3.5rem;
          padding: 0px;
        }

        .left-col::before {
          background-image: url('data:image/svg+xml;base64,PHN2ZyB3aWR0aD0iODAiIGhlaWdodD0iMTExNyIgdmlld0JveD0iMCAwIDgwIDExMTciIGZpbGw9Im5vbmUiIHhtbG5zPSJodHRwOi8vd3d3LnczLm9yZy8yMDAwL3N2ZyI+CjxwYXRoIGQ9Ik04MCAwTDc5LjE3NzMgMC4wMDAyMzg4N0wxNi4yMzEzIDU4MC4yNzFMNDcuMTEwNSA1MTguNjQ2TDAgMTExN0g4MFYwWiIgZmlsbD0iIzE4MTgxOCIvPgo8L3N2Zz4K'),
            url('data:image/svg+xml;base64,');
          background-size:
            auto 110%,
            cover;
          content: var(--tw-content);
          background-position:
            right -1px center,
            center center;
        }
      }

      .left-col img {
        position: relative;
      }

      .left-col img:first-child {
        margin-left: auto;
        margin-right: auto;
        width: 100%;
        max-width: 290px;
      }

      .left-col img:last-child {
        max-width: 165px;
      }

      @media (min-width: 768px) {
        .left-col img:first-child {
          max-width: 540px;
        }
      }

      @media (min-width: 1024px) {
        .left-col img:first-child {
          margin-left: 0px;
          margin-right: 0px;
          width: auto;
          max-width: 100%;
        }

        .left-col img:last-child {
          max-width: 100%;
        }
      }

      .right-col {
        display: flex;
        width: 100%;
        flex: 1 1 auto;
        flex-direction: column;
        justify-content: flex-end;
        --tw-bg-opacity: 1;
        background-color: rgb(24 24 24 / var(--tw-bg-opacity));
        padding: 1.5rem;
      }

      @media (min-width: 768px) {
        .right-col {
          padding-top: 2.25rem;
          padding-bottom: 2.25rem;
          padding-left: 3rem;
          padding-right: 3rem;
        }
      }

      @media (min-width: 1024px) {
        .right-col {
          width: 40%;
          padding-left: 2.25rem;
          padding-right: 2.25rem;
          padding-bottom: 2.25rem;
          padding-top: 8rem;
        }
      }

      @media (min-width: 1536px) {
        .right-col {
          padding-left: 5rem;
          padding-right: 5rem;
          padding-top: 13rem;
        }
      }

      @media (min-width: 2560px) {
        .right-col {
          padding: 270px 200px 36px 100px;
        }
      }

      .right-col__info {
        display: flex;
        flex-direction: column;
        gap: 0.75rem;
      }

      @media (min-width: 768px) {
        .right-col__info {
          gap: 1.5rem;
        }
      }

      .right-col__info-title {
        font-family: 'Archivo Black', sans-serif;
        font-size: 1.5rem;
        line-height: 2rem;
        font-weight: 800;
        text-transform: uppercase;
        line-height: 1.25;
        --tw-text-opacity: 1;
        color: rgb(255 255 255 / var(--tw-text-opacity));
      }

      @media (min-width: 768px) {
        .right-col__info-title {
          font-size: 42px;
        }
      }

      .right-col__info-note {
        font-size: 1.125rem;
        line-height: 1.75rem;
        --tw-text-opacity: 1;
        color: rgb(189 189 189 / var(--tw-text-opacity));
      }

      .right-col__info--submitted {
        display: none;
      }

      .right-col__form {
        display: flex;
        flex-direction: column;
        gap: 0.875rem;
        font-size: 1.125rem;
        line-height: 1.75rem;
        line-height: 1.5;
        --tw-text-opacity: 1;
        color: rgb(189 189 189 / var(--tw-text-opacity));
      }

      @media (min-width: 768px) {
        .right-col__form {
          gap: 1.5rem;
        }
      }

      .right-col__form-checkbox {
        display: flex;
        height: 1rem;
        width: 1rem;
        flex: none;
        align-items: center;
        justify-content: center;
        border-radius: 0.125rem;
        border-width: 1px;
        --tw-border-opacity: 1;
        border-color: rgb(189 189 189 / var(--tw-border-opacity));
        background-color: transparent;
      }

      .right-col__form-checkbox::before {
        height: 0.25rem;
        width: 0.625rem;
        --tw-rotate: -45deg;
        transform: translate(var(--tw-translate-x), var(--tw-translate-y)) rotate(var(--tw-rotate))
          skewX(var(--tw-skew-x)) skewY(var(--tw-skew-y)) scaleX(var(--tw-scale-x)) scaleY(var(--tw-scale-y));
        border-bottom-width: 2px;
        border-left-width: 2px;
        border-bottom-color: rgb(189 189 189 / var(--tw-border-opacity));
        --tw-border-opacity: 1;
        border-left-color: rgb(189 189 189 / var(--tw-border-opacity));
        opacity: 0;
        --tw-content: '';
        content: var(--tw-content);
      }

      .peer:checked ~ .right-col__form-checkbox::before {
        content: var(--tw-content);
        opacity: 1;
      }

      .right-col__form-note {
        display: none;
        --tw-text-opacity: 1;
        color: rgb(237 26 92 / var(--tw-text-opacity));
      }

      .right-col__form-label {
        display: flex;
        flex-direction: column;
        gap: 0.625rem;
      }

      .right-col__form-label input[type='email'] {
        display: flex;
        height: 3.5rem;
        border-radius: 0.375rem;
        border-width: 1px;
        border-color: transparent;
        --tw-bg-opacity: 1;
        background-color: rgb(47 47 47 / var(--tw-bg-opacity));
        padding-left: 1.5rem;
        padding-right: 1.5rem;
        font-size: 1.125rem;
        line-height: 1.75rem;
        --tw-text-opacity: 1;
        color: rgb(242 242 242 / var(--tw-text-opacity));
      }

      .right-col__form-label input[type='email']::-moz-placeholder {
        --tw-placeholder-opacity: 1;
        color: rgb(130 130 130 / var(--tw-placeholder-opacity));
      }

      .right-col__form-label input[type='email']::placeholder {
        --tw-placeholder-opacity: 1;
        color: rgb(130 130 130 / var(--tw-placeholder-opacity));
      }

      .right-col__form-label--terms {
        flex-direction: row;
        flex-wrap: wrap;
        align-items: center;
        row-gap: 0.625rem;
        -moz-column-gap: 1rem;
        column-gap: 1rem;
      }

      .right-col__form-label--terms input[type='checkbox'] {
        display: none;
      }

      .right-col__form-label--terms a {
        border-bottom-width: 1px;
        --tw-border-opacity: 1;
        border-bottom-color: rgb(189 189 189 / var(--tw-border-opacity));
      }

      .right-col__form-label--terms a:hover {
        border-bottom-color: transparent;
      }

      .right-col__form-label--terms label {
        order: 9999;
      }

      .right-col__form-label.error input[type='email'] {
        --tw-border-opacity: 1;
        border-color: rgb(237 26 92 / var(--tw-border-opacity));
        --tw-text-opacity: 1;
        color: rgb(237 26 92 / var(--tw-text-opacity));
      }

      .right-col__form-label.error .right-col__form-checkbox {
        --tw-border-opacity: 1;
        border-color: rgb(237 26 92 / var(--tw-border-opacity));
        --tw-text-opacity: 1;
        color: rgb(237 26 92 / var(--tw-text-opacity));
      }

      .right-col__form-label.error .right-col__form-note {
        display: block;
      }

      .right-col__form-legacy {
        width: calc(100% - 32px);
      }

      .right-col__form-submit {
        position: relative;
        margin-top: 0.625rem;
        display: flex;
        min-height: 56px;
        width: 100%;
        align-items: center;
        justify-content: center;
        overflow: hidden;
        border-radius: 0.75rem;
        --tw-bg-opacity: 1;
        background-color: rgb(237 26 92 / var(--tw-bg-opacity));
        padding-left: 1.5rem;
        padding-right: 1.5rem;
        text-align: center;
        font-size: 1.125rem;
        line-height: 1.75rem;
        font-weight: 900;
        --tw-text-opacity: 1;
        color: rgb(255 255 255 / var(--tw-text-opacity));
      }

      .right-col__form-submit::before {
        position: absolute;
        display: none;
        height: 100%;
        width: 100%;
        background-color: rgb(0 0 0 / 0.5);
        --tw-content: '';
        content: var(--tw-content);
      }

      .right-col__form-submit::after {
        position: absolute;
        display: none;
        height: 1.5rem;
        content: var(--tw-content);
        width: 1.5rem;
      }

      @keyframes spin {
        to {
          content: var(--tw-content);
          transform: rotate(360deg);
        }
      }

      .right-col__form-submit::after {
        animation: spin 1s linear infinite;
        background-image: url('data:image/svg+xml;base64,');
        background-size: 24px;
        background-position: center;
        background-repeat: no-repeat;
        --tw-content: '';
        content: var(--tw-content);
      }

      .right-col__form-submit:hover {
        --tw-bg-opacity: 1;
        background-color: rgb(240 71 124 / var(--tw-bg-opacity));
      }

      @media (min-width: 768px) {
        .right-col__form-submit {
          margin-top: 0.75rem;
        }
      }

      .right-col__form-submit.loading {
        font-size: 0px;
      }

      .right-col__form-submit.loading::before {
        content: var(--tw-content);
        display: block;
      }

      .right-col__form-submit.loading::after {
        content: var(--tw-content);
        display: block;
      }

      .right-col__form-submit.loading:hover {
        --tw-bg-opacity: 1;
        background-color: rgb(237 26 92 / var(--tw-bg-opacity));
      }

      .right-col__social-list {
        display: flex;
        gap: 1.5rem;
      }

      .right-col__social-item {
        height: 1.5rem;
        width: 1.5rem;
        opacity: 0.5;
      }

      .right-col__social-item:hover {
        opacity: 1;
      }

      .right-col__nav-links {
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
        justify-content: center;
        row-gap: 1.25rem;
        -moz-column-gap: 2rem;
        column-gap: 2rem;
      }

      .right-col__nav-link {
        font-size: 0.875rem;
        line-height: 1.25rem;
        --tw-text-opacity: 1;
        color: rgb(130 130 130 / var(--tw-text-opacity));
      }

      .right-col__nav-link:hover {
        --tw-text-opacity: 1;
        color: rgb(189 189 189 / var(--tw-text-opacity));
      }

      .right-col__footer {
        margin-top: auto;
        display: flex;
        flex-direction: column;
        gap: 1.5rem;
        padding-top: 3rem;
      }

      @media (min-width: 768px) {
        .right-col__footer {
          gap: 2.25rem;
        }
      }

      .right-col__footer-links {
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
        justify-content: space-between;
        gap: 1rem;
      }

      @media (max-width: 350px) {
        .right-col__footer-links {
          flex-direction: column;
          justify-content: center;
        }
      }

      .right-col__footer-copyright {
        text-align: center;
        font-size: 0.75rem;
        line-height: 1rem;
        --tw-text-opacity: 1;
        color: rgb(79 79 79 / var(--tw-text-opacity));
      }

      .right-col.submitted .right-col__info {
        display: none;
      }

      .right-col.submitted .right-col__info--submitted {
        display: flex;
      }
    </style>
  </head>
  <body>
    <div class="left-col">
      <img
        alt=""
        src="data:image/png;base64,"
      />
      <img
        alt=""
        src="data:image/png;base64,"
      />
    </div>
    <div class="right-col" id="rightCol">
      <div class="right-col__info">
        <div class="right-col__info-title">Blankos Block Party is going mobile!</div>
        <form class="right-col__form" id="subscribeForm">
          <span>Get insider access to early announcements when you sign up for updates:</span>
          <label class="right-col__form-label">
            <input type="email" placeholder="Email" id="inputField" name="email" autocomplete="email" required />
            <span id="emailError" class="right-col__form-note">Please enter a valid email address</span>
          </label>
          <label class="right-col__form-label right-col__form-label--terms">
            <input type="checkbox" class="peer" id="termsCheckBox" name="checkbox" required />
            <span class="right-col__form-checkbox"></span>
            <span class="right-col__form-legacy">
              Yes, please send me the latest announcement from Mythical and Blankos. Signing up indicates that you consent to our
              <a href="https://mythicalgames.com/privacy" target="_blank">Privacy Policy</a>
            </span>
            <span id="termsError" class="right-col__form-note"
              >Ensure you agree to our â€˜Privacy Policyâ€™ by checking the checkbox above before proceeding.</span
            >
          </label>
          <button type="button" id="submitButton" class="right-col__form-submit">Notify Me</button>
        </form>
      </div>

      <div class="right-col__info right-col__info--submitted">
        <div class="right-col__info-title">Thank You!</div>
        <div class="right-col__info-note">Your request has been confirmed!</div>
      </div>

      <div class="right-col__footer">
        <div class="right-col__footer-links">
          <div class="right-col__nav-links">
            <a href="https://mythicalgames.com/terms-of-service" class="right-col__nav-link">Terms of use</a>
            <a href="https://mythicalgames.com/privacy" class="right-col__nav-link">Privacy Notice</a>
          </div>
          <div class="right-col__social-list">
            <a href="https://discord.gg/playblankos" class="right-col__social-item">
              <img
                alt=""
                src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
              />
            </a>
            <a href="https://twitter.com/PlayBlankos" class="right-col__social-item">
              <img
                alt=""
                src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
              />
            </a>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="right-col__footer-copyright">© 2024 Mythical, Inc. Blankos Block Party. All rights reserved.</div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </body>
